# SO Line Product Template Visibility

This module allows you to show and hide the product and product variant fields on sales order lines.
By default the product variant will be visible and the product is hidden.

## Installation

To install this module, you need to:

1. Only install

## Configuration

To configure this module, you need to:

1. Nothing

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Go to the Sales module
2. Create or edit a new quotation
3. From the sales order line select the fields you want to be displayed.
